results.name: Sostanza stakeholder demo opens with planner actions
Recommended multi-strain mix opens ready to create
results.detail: RECOMMENDED MIX 5-strain mix · 84 plants per strain · FLW-06 capacity plan Next: review forecast and create the batch group.

results.name: Clone shortfall warns without blocking create
results.detail: CREATE WITH SOURCE WARNING → · 883 clone cuts are still open. You can create the plan with this warning or resolve source coverage above.

results.name: Veg overload is a soft warning with auto recovery
results.detail: VEG CAPACITY WARNING VEG-01 PEAKS 976/840 This plan can still be created, but veg labor or bench space needs review before May 27, 2026. USE AUTO · VEG-02

results.name: Flower capacity block has guided recovery actions
results.detail: FLOWER CAPACITY BLOCK FLW-01 HOLDS 252 PLANTS; THIS PLAN HAS 420 Resolve the plant count or move to a room that fits before creating the batch group. REDUCE TO 252 PLANTS USE FLW-06

results.name: Flower capacity recovery paths clear the block
results.detail: Reduce-to-cap and use-room recovery both cleared the flower capacity block.

results.name: Finalize shows fixed confirmation banner
results.detail: FINALIZED · 5-STRAIN BATCH GROUP · 420 PLANTS planned into FLW-06 ADDED TO PLANNING VIEW · CLIENT ONLY ×

results.name: Mobile warning layouts stay inside viewport
